{{Short description|2016 film festival in Berlin, Germany}}

The '''66th [[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from 11 to 21 February 2016, with American actress [[Meryl Streep]] as the president of the jury.<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html |title=Prizes of the International Jury |access-date=20 December 2015 |work=Berlinale |archive-date=13 February 2018 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180213193955/https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html |url-status=dead }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.theguardian.com/film/2015/oct/14/meryl-streep-berlinale-berlin-film-festival-jury-president-2016 |title=Meryl Streep gets Berlin's vote as president of film festival jury |access-date=20 December 2015 |work=The Guardian|date=14 October 2015 }}</ref> The [[Golden Bear#Golden Bear – Honorary Award|Honorary Golden Bear]] for lifetime achievement was presented to German cinematographer [[Michael Ballhaus]].<ref name="honorary">{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/hommage/index.html |title=Homage 2016 And Honorary Golden Bear For Michael Ballhaus |access-date=20 December 2015 |work=Berlinale |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805183416/https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/hommage/index.html |archive-date=5 August 2017 |url-status=dead }}</ref>

''[[Hail, Caesar!]]'', directed by [[Joel and Ethan Coen]], was selected to open the festival.<ref name="opening">{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/wettbewerb/wettbewerb-presse-detail_29524.html |title=Hail, Caesar! directed by Joel and Ethan Coen, to open the 66th Berlinale |access-date=20 December 2015 |work=Berlinale |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160415124050/https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/wettbewerb/wettbewerb-presse-detail_29524.html |archive-date=15 April 2016 |url-status=dead }}</ref> The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to the Italian documentary ''[[Fire at Sea]]'', directed by [[Gianfranco Rosi (director)|Gianfranco Rosi]], which also serves as closing night film.<ref name="awards">{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html |title=Prizes of the International Jury |access-date=20 February 2016 |work=Berlinale |archive-date=13 February 2018 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180213193955/https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html |url-status=dead }}</ref><ref name="Variety">{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/2016/film/festivals/berlin-film-festival-competition-winners-2016-1201711207/ |title=Berlin: 'Fire at Sea' Wins Golden Bear for Best Film |access-date=20 February 2016 |work=Variety|date=20 February 2016 }}</ref><ref name="BBC">{{cite news |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-35623412 |title=Berlin film festival: Fire at Sea wins Golden Bear |access-date=21 February 2016 |work=BBC News|date=20 February 2016 }}</ref>

==Jury==
[[File:Meryl Streep from "Florence Foster Jenkins" at Opening Ceremony of the Tokyo International Film Festival 2016 (33644504135) (cropped).jpg|thumb|190px|[[Meryl Streep]], Jury President]]

===Main Competition===
* [[Meryl Streep]], American actress - Jury President<ref name="full-jury">{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html |title=International Jury |access-date=2 February 2016 |work=Berlinale |archive-date=1 March 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170301075104/https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html |url-status=dead }}</ref><ref name="Jury">{{Cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_27165.html |title=Berlinale 2015: International Jury |access-date=27 January 2015 |work=Berlinale |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150215151257/http://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_27165.html |archive-date=15 February 2015 |url-status=dead }}</ref>
* [[Lars Eidinger]], German actor
* [[Nick James (critic)|Nick James]], British film critic
* [[Brigitte Lacombe]], French photographer
* [[Clive Owen]], British actor
* [[Alba Rohrwacher]], Italian actress
* [[Małgorzata Szumowska]], Polish director and screenwriter

===Best First Feature Award Jury===
* [[Michel Franco]], Mexican filmmaker and producer<ref name="JuryFirstFeature">{{Cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/best_first_feature_award/index.html |title=Best First Feature Award, endowed with € 50,000, funded by GWFF |access-date=2 February 2016 |work=Berlinale}}</ref>

* [[Ursula Meier]], Swiss film director

===International Short Film Jury===
* Sheikha Hoor Al-Qasimi, Emirates curator, artist and lecturer<ref name="JuryShortFilm">{{Cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_kurzfilmjury/index.html |title=Prizes of the International Short Film Jury |access-date=20 December 2015 |work=Berlinale}}</ref>
* Katerina Gregos, Greek curator, writer and lecturer
* [[Avi Mograbi]], Israeli filmmaker, video artist and lecturer

==Official Awards==
[[File:Gianfranco Rosi.JPG|thumb|The [[Golden Bear]] of 2016 was awarded to ''[[Fire at Sea]]'' by Italian director [[Gianfranco Rosi (director)|Gianfranco Rosi]].]]
The following prizes were awarded:<ref name="honorary"/><ref name="awards"/><ref name="Variety"/><ref name="PAA">{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_32852.html |title=Berlinale 2016: The Panorama Audience Awards go to Junction 48 and Who's Gonna Love Me Now? |work=Berlinale |access-date=21 February 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304135754/https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_32852.html |archive-date=4 March 2016 |url-status=dead }}</ref><ref name="Awardslist">{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/66_ifb/66_Berlinale_Awards.pdf |title=The Awards Of The 66th Berlin International Film Festival | work=Berlinale}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=http://english.ahram.org.eg/NewsContent/5/32/183507/Arts--Culture/Film/Tunisia,-the-only-Arab-country-listed-in-Berlinale.aspx|title=Tunisia, the only Arab country listed in Berlinale 2016 official competition - Film - Arts & Culture - Ahram Online|website=english.ahram.org.eg|language=en|access-date=20 December 2017}}</ref><ref>{{Cite news|url=https://variety.com/2017/film/news/tunisia-mohamed-ben-attia-direct-isis-drama-weldi-1202486320/|title=Tunisia's Mohamed Ben Attia to Direct New ISIS-Themed Drama (EXCLUSIVE)|last=Vivarelli|first=Nick|date=4 July 2017|work=Variety|access-date=20 December 2017|language=en-US}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Fire at Sea]]'' by [[Gianfranco Rosi (director)|Gianfranco Rosi]]
* [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]]: ''[[Death in Sarajevo]]'' by [[Danis Tanović]]
* [[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: ''[[A Lullaby to the Sorrowful Mystery]]'' by [[Lav Diaz]]
* [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Mia Hansen-Løve]] for ''[[Things to Come (2016 film)|Things to Come]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Trine Dyrholm]] for ''[[The Commune]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Majd Mastoura]] for ''[[Hedi (film)|Hedi]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Script]]: [[Tomasz Wasilewski]] for ''[[United States of Love]]''
* '''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': [[Mark Lee Ping Bin]] for ''[[Crosscurrent (film)|Crosscurrent]]'' (Cinematography)

=== [[Golden Bear#Golden Bear – Honorary Award|Honorary Golden Bear]] ===
* [[Michael Ballhaus]]

=== Best First Feature Award ===
* [[Mohamed Ben Attia]] for ''[[Hedi (film)|Hedi]]''

=== Short Film Competition ===

*[[Short Film Golden Bear|Golden Bear For Best Short Film]]: ''Batrachian's Ballad'' by Leonor Teles
* Silver Bear Jury Prize: ''A Man Returned '' by [[Mahdi Fleifel]]
* '''Audi Short Film Award''': ''Anchorage Prohibited'' by Chiang Wei Liang

=== Panorama ===
* '''Panorama Audience Award''':
** '''1st Place''': ''[[Junction 48]]'' by [[Udi Aloni]]
